description: STAGED / NOT YET RUNNABLE — the Shortcuts campaign. Blocked on the L5 golden sitting (docs/lab/golden-runbook.md §5 + docs/lab/l5-build-cards.md): the four proxy shortcuts (things-proxy-create-heading, -edit-title, -delete-items, -find-items) must exist in the golden before these probes resolve. Vector `shortcuts` runs via `exec` calling `shortcuts run <proxy> -i <json>` (Apple exposes no in-suite Shortcuts step; runtime execution is fully scriptable once the proxies are built). Primary target: the heading lifecycle in EXISTING projects — the one gap only Shortcuts fills (gaps.md §1 + §0 headings doctrine). Expectations below are DISCOVERY GUESSES until the first post-L5 run locks them; each probe self-creates its fixtures so seeds stay pristine. Ordered: read probe first (lowest risk, no mutation), then heading create/rename/delete, then the re-verify sweep (to-do<->project conversion, repeat params, project tags/reminders via Shortcuts).

probes.title: READ probe: what identifiers does things-proxy-find-items structured output carry? (uuid? name only?) — lowest-risk proxy, no mutation

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S01-FINDME'

probes.title: HEADING CREATE in an existing project via things-proxy-create-heading — THE primary S-campaign target (URL/AppleScript both dead, gaps.md §1)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S02-PROJ' AND type=1

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S02-HEAD' AND type=2

probes.title: HEADING RENAME via things-proxy-edit-title (Set Title of a heading entity)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S03-PROJ' AND type=1
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S03-HEAD' AND type=2

commands.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S03-HEAD-RN' AND type=2

probes.title: HEADING DELETE via things-proxy-delete-items (Trash, immediately-delete toggle OFF)

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S04-PROJ' AND type=1
SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S04-HEAD' AND type=2

commands.waitSql: SELECT 1 FROM TMTask WHERE title='S04-HEAD' AND trashed=1

probes.title: RE-VERIFY (Shortcuts): to-do -> project conversion. AppleScript/URL both dead (E16). Does a Shortcuts action expose it? DISCOVERY — likely unsupported.

setup.waitSql: SELECT uuid FROM TMTask WHERE title='S05-TODO' AND type=0

commands.note: PLACEHOLDER — no proxy exists for convert; the L5 Card 5 action-catalog sweep decides whether a convert action exists at all. If it does, add a things-proxy-convert and wire it here.
